top_signals.title: Paramount’s $110 Billion Warner Takeover Investigated by UK
top_signals.summary: Britain’s merger watchdog has opened a probe into Paramount Skydance Corp.’s $110 billion takeover of Warner Bros. Discovery Inc.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Here we go again? Assessing the inflation risks of the recent energy shock − speech by Megan Greene
top_signals.summary: Given at University of Derby Business School
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Circle debuts cirBTC on Ethereum to challenge Coinbase in the wrapped bitcoin market
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: ‘Stuck in distribution’: Bitcoin slips below $63,000 as analysts warn rallies are being sold, not bought
top_signals.summary: Bitcoin dropped below $63,000 as analysts warn of a distribution phase dominating accumulation appetite amid institutional outflows.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Telemundo, Fox Aim for Viewer Records With World Cup in the US
top_signals.summary: The start of the FIFA World Cup is just two days away, but for Comcast Corp.’s Telemundo, it’s been more than two years in the making. The Miami-based television network, which holds the Spanish-language rights to the tournament in the US, has long been preparing to lure in viewers with the idea that “soccer is more fun en Español.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: SpaceX’s $1.78tn IPO asks investors to buy Musk’s moonshots
top_signals.summary: Public markets asked to price in advances in AI, Starlink and space-based computing long before lift-off
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Why are we still arguing about the industrial revolution?
top_signals.summary: Historical data does not offer much insight about how our predecessors navigated profound change

top_signals.title: Nuvalent shares surge 39% after UK's GSK agrees to buy the cancer drugmaker for $10.6 billion
top_signals.summary: The deal comes at a time of biotech dealmaking frenzy, driven by looming patent cliffs, newly buoyant public markets and drugmakers' race to bolster pipelines.
